pred_reason: The contract contains multiple reentrancy vulnerabilities including cross-function issues via balanceOf calls and an ineffective lockTheSwap mechanism, directly aligning with SWC-107. Additionally, integer overflow/underflow risks exist despite SafeMath usage, corresponding to SWC-101. Evidence: Critical reentrancy found in swap/transfer functions via balanceOf calls; lockTheSwap modifier implementation flaws enabling reentrant attacks; Arithmetic operations vulnerable to overflow despite SafeMath coverage
